name: Cafe del Mar
shortDescription: Cozy clifftop cafe with great coffee and sea views. Vibrant after 6 PM.

name: Darjeeling Cafe
shortDescription: Popular hangout spot with good food and relaxed vibe.

name: Zostel Varkala
shortDescription: Vibrant hostel with good security and female-only dorms.

name: Varkala Beach Surfing
shortDescription: Early morning surf lessons with trusted instructors.

name: Villa Maya
shortDescription: Heritage restaurant offering a premium safe dining experience.

name: Napier Museum
shortDescription: Historical art and natural history museum. Safe during daylight.

name: Central Railway Station Area
shortDescription: Busy transit hub. Best to remain cautious at night.
